config.option.xtracr_realcamera.toModelV: For detailed settings, please go to the %s screen (key bind need to be set to open it)
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.adjustO: When pressing the adjustment key, adjust the offset or rotation of camera
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.adjustS: Length or 1/100 of the angle of the adjustment per step
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.bindRes: For several frames after the binding failure, continue to use the previous successful binding result
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.cameraR: Note: Pitch, yaw and roll are rotations on the left, up and front axes respectively
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.classic: Determine which to adjust when pressing the adjustment key
Camera's offset from its rotation center
Note: player's front, up and left are the X, Y and Z axes respectively
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.disable:
Three matching methods are supported:
1. Wildcard `*` matching (e.g., `minecraft:*sword`)
2. Tag matching (starts with `#`, e.g., `#minecraft:swords`)
3. Direct item ID (e.g., `minecraft:diamond_sword`)
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.displac: Smooth factor of camera displacement, the higher the value, the smoother the movement
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.dynamic:
When enabled, the crosshair will follow the player's view, ensuring consistent hit result
Recommended to enable when Jade, WTHIT or similar mods are installed
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.isClass: Classic mode only makes simple changes to the position and rotation of camera
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.legacyB:
Using the binding mode of legacy version (v0.5), only vanilla model and actions based on vanilla model are supported
Its properties can be set in 'LEGACY_MODE' of the %s screen when enabled
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.renderM: Render player model in first-person perspective
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.renderS: Arrows, bee stings and other objects that can be stuck in the player's body
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.rerende: Render the model again at the original rendering time to avoid some visual problems caused by rendering early
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.rotatio: Smooth factor of camera rotation, the higher the value, the smoother the movement
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.scale: Control the size of the offsets
config.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.swimOut: The time before enabling main feature after exiting swimming state (1 tick = 0.05s)
message.xtracr_realcamera.bindingFailed: [%s]: Binding failed, please go to the %s screen and configure manually (Key: %s)
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.realcamer: Make the camera more realistic in the first-person view.
screen.tooltip.xtracr_realcamera.modelVi: When disabled, the camera's relative relationship to the model will not change, but the camera's corresponding attributes will not be modified by this mod

The texture id of the selected model (not necessary to be the full id), can be shortened when saving to make it easier to recognize.
For example, shorten minecraft:textures/entity/player/slim/alex.png to minecraft:textures/entity/player/.
